prompt: {"type":"fashion lookbook collage","subject":{"gender_presentation":"young woman","face_visibility":"face intentionally blurred and indistinct in every photo","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"light brown\"}","style":"straight shoulder-length hair with a center or slight side part"},"body_type":"slim","aesthetic":"soft neutral Korean street style, cozy fall and winter capsule wardrobe"},"layout":{"background":"clean light gray studio wall","presentation":"nine vertical printed photo cards arranged in a precise 3x3 grid, each card clipped at the top with an oversized silver paper clip, slight shadows and subtle stacking of paper sheets behind some cards","count":9,"sections":[{"title":"top row","position":"upper third","count":3,"labels":["cream blouse with scarf and black wide-leg trousers","dark brown shearling-collar bomber jacket over a cream mini dress with knee-high brown boots","beige teddy fleece jacket with white loose pants and brown shoulder bag"]},{"title":"middle row","position":"center","count":3,"labels":["off-shoulder dark taupe knit sweater with olive cargo pants","oversized gray hoodie worn as a mini dress with white leg warmers","fitted taupe long-sleeve top with faded blue loose jeans"]},{"title":"bottom row","position":"lower third","count":3,"labels":["white puffer jacket with white loose pants and dark handbag","soft cream zip cardigan with dark brown wide trousers","long charcoal trench-style coat layered over a gray hoodie and short black bottoms with brown boots"]}]},"styling":{"palette":"muted neutrals: cream, beige, taupe, gray, brown, black, olive, washed denim blue","footwear":"mostly tan or brown casual shoes and boots","bags":"brown shoulder bags or handbags in most looks","pose_style":"full-body fashion poses, relaxed stance, hands in pockets or holding bag, editorial but casual"},"camera":{"angle":"straight-on flat lay wall display illusion","framing":"entire 3x3 arrangement centered vertically","lighting":"soft diffused studio lighting with minimal contrast"},"rendering":"photorealistic fashion editorial collage, clean minimalist composition, subtle texture on paper, high detail in fabrics and layering","prompt":"Create a photorealistic minimalist fashion lookbook collage featuring {argument name=\"number of outfits\" default=\"9\"} full-body outfit photos of the same {argument name=\"model type\" default=\"young woman\"}, displayed as printed cards clipped to a pale gray wall with oversized silver paper clips. Use a 3x3 grid with exactly 9 looks. Keep the face blurred and non-detailed in every image. Style the wardrobe in {argument name=\"fashion aesthetic\" default=\"soft neutral Korean street style\"} with a muted palette and layered fall-winter outfits. Include these 9 looks: 1) cream blouse, scarf, black wide-leg trousers, printed tote bag; 2) dark brown shearling-collar bomber jacket, cream mini dress, brown knee-high boots; 3) beige teddy fleece jacket, white loose pants, brown shoulder bag; 4) off-shoulder dark taupe knit sweater, olive cargo pants, dark handbag; 5) oversized gray hoodie mini dress, white leg warmers, dark shoulder bag; 6) fitted taupe long-sleeve top, faded loose jeans, dark shoulder bag; 7) white puffer jacket, white loose pants, dark handbag; 8) cream zip cardigan, dark brown wide trousers, dark shoulder bag; 9) charcoal long coat over gray hoodie and short black bottoms, brown boots, dark handbag. Soft diffused studio lighting, subtle shadows, clean paper texture, editorial fashion catalog feel on a simple neutral background."}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"时尚 Lookbook 拼贴","subject":{"gender_presentation":"年轻女性","face_visibility":"每张照片中的面部均刻意模糊且不清晰","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"浅棕色\"}","style":"直发，齐肩，中分或微侧分"},"body_type":"苗条","aesthetic":"柔和中性韩系街头风格，舒适的秋冬胶囊衣橱"},"layout":{"background":"干净的浅灰色摄影棚墙面","presentation":"九张垂直打印的照片卡片，以精确的 3x3 网格排列，每张卡片顶部用超大号银色回形针夹住，卡片后方有轻微阴影和细微的纸张堆叠效果","count":9,"sections":[{"title":"顶行","position":"上三分之一","count":3,"labels":["米色衬衫搭配围巾和黑色阔腿裤","深棕色羊羔毛领飞行员夹克搭配米色迷你裙和棕色过膝靴","米色泰迪绒夹克搭配白色宽松长裤和棕色单肩包"]},{"title":"中行","position":"中心","count":3,"labels":["露肩深灰褐色针织毛衣搭配橄榄绿工装裤","超大款灰色连帽衫作为迷你裙穿着，搭配白色腿套","修身灰褐色长袖上衣搭配水洗蓝宽松牛仔裤"]},{"title":"底行","position":"下三分之一","count":3,"labels":["白色羽绒服搭配白色宽松长裤和深色手提包","柔和米色拉链开衫搭配深棕色阔腿裤","炭灰色长款风衣叠穿灰色连帽衫和黑色短下装，搭配棕色靴子"]}]},"styling":{"palette":"柔和中性色：米色、浅褐色、灰褐色、灰色、棕色、黑色、橄榄绿、水洗牛仔蓝","footwear":"主要是棕褐色或棕色的休闲鞋和靴子","bags":"多数造型搭配棕色单肩包或手提包","pose_style":"全身时尚姿势，姿态放松，双手插兜或手提包，具有编辑风格但休闲"},"camera":{"angle":"正对平铺墙面展示效果","framing":"整个 3x3 排列垂直居中","lighting":"柔和的漫射摄影棚光线，对比度极低"},"rendering":"照片级真实时尚编辑拼贴，干净的极简主义构图，纸张纹理细腻，面料和叠穿细节丰富","prompt":"创建一个照片级真实的极简主义时尚 Lookbook 拼贴，包含 {argument name=\"number of outfits\" default=\"9\"} 张同一位 {argument name=\"model type\" default=\"年轻女性\"} 的全身服装照片，以打印卡片的形式用超大号银色回形针夹在浅灰色墙面上。使用 3x3 网格，正好 9 种造型。每张图片中的面部保持模糊且无细节。服装风格为 {argument name=\"fashion aesthetic\" default=\"柔和中性韩系街头风格\"}，采用柔和的色调和秋冬叠穿搭配。包含以下 9 种造型：1) 米色衬衫、围巾、黑色阔腿裤、印花托特包；2) 深棕色羊羔毛领飞行员夹克、米色迷你裙、棕色过膝靴；3) 米色泰迪绒夹克、白色宽松长裤、棕色单肩包；4) 露肩深灰褐色针织毛衣、橄榄绿工装裤、深色手提包；5) 超大款灰色连帽衫迷你裙、白色腿套、深色单肩包；6) 修身灰褐色长袖上衣、水洗宽松牛仔裤、深色单肩包；7) 白色羽绒服、白色宽松长裤、深色手提包；8) 米色拉链开衫、深棕色阔腿裤、深色单肩包；9) 炭灰色长款风衣叠穿灰色连帽衫和黑色短下装、棕色靴子、深色手提包。柔和的漫射摄影棚光线，细微阴影，干净的纸张纹理，在简单的中性背景下呈现出时尚目录的质感。"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 极简主义 9 宫格时尚拼贴：一个照片级真实的 3x3 时尚 Lookbook 提示词，用于生成中性色调的服装拼贴，风格类似于钉在墙上的编辑部服装卡片。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 92；构图: centered, full-body, grid, layered, vertical；风格: realistic, photorealistic, editorial, minimalist, studio；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, grid, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, editorial, minimalist, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, camera]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
